user.title: Add a Tapo L630
user.description: Enter the bulb's local IP address and your Tapo account credentials. The bulb and Home Assistant must be on the same network.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Tapo L630
reauth_confirm.description: Enter the current credentials for this bulb.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the bulb
error.invalid_host: Enter an IP address or hostname without a URL scheme
error.unsupported_device: The device is not a Tapo L630
error.unknown: Unexpected error communicating with the bulb
